---
title: "About"
---

## The module

**Introduction to R and RStudio** is the data science foundations module of the **DMgtAsia**
course, and the precursor to the Spatial Epidemiology module. It draws on data science
trainings delivered across India and is packaged here as a self-paced or workshop module with
live code and hands-on exercises.

## Author

- **Dr. Arun Mitra**, Assistant Professor, Department of Community & Family Medicine, All India
  Institute of Medical Sciences (AIIMS), Bibinagar, Hyderabad, Telangana

## Source & licence

Source repository: <https://github.com/drarunmitra/DMgtAsia_DataScience_IntroR>

Teaching materials are released under CC-BY-SA; code under MIT, unless noted otherwise.

## Acknowledgements

Built on R, the `tidyverse`, `quarto-live` (webR), and Quarto.
